passives.name: Ironhide
passives.description: Exhaustion locked dice are d6s instead of d4s.

skills.name: Bash
skills.description: Deal dice + STR damage to a single enemy.

skills.name: Blood Cleave
skills.description: Spend 5% current HP (temp HP first, floors real HP at 1). Deal dice + STR + 5 damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Bloodletting
skills.description: Track all damage taken this turn (including self-inflicted) up to dice + CON. Convert tracked damage to temp HP at start of next turn.

learnable_skills.name: Desperate Strike
learnable_skills.description: Deal damage scaled by missing HP. Multiplier ranges from 1.0 at full HP to 2.0 at 1 HP.

learnable_skills.name: Lifeblood Slam
learnable_skills.description: Spend 10% current HP (temp HP first, floors at 1). Deal dice + CON to all enemies. Allies gain temp HP equal to half the damage dealt.

learnable_skills.name: Primal Roar
learnable_skills.description: Gain temp HP equal to dice + CON. Apply 1 Weak to all enemies for 1 turn.

learnable_skills.name: Battle Worn
learnable_skills.description: Deal dice + STR + (exhaustion_level x 2) damage to a single enemy.

learnable_skills.name: Second Wind
learnable_skills.description: Once per combat. Reduce exhaustion by dice result. Gain temp HP equal to exhaustion_level x dice result. Heal exhaustion_level x CON modifier real HP.
